DirectMusic Enumerated Types

This section contains references for the following enumerated types:

  • DMUS_CHORDKEYF_FLAGS
  • DMUS_CURVE_FLAGS
  • DMUS_NOTEF_FLAGS
  • DMUS_PLAYMODE_FLAGS
  • DMUS_PMSGF_FLAGS
